definition_cn: 一种语法范畴, 表示动词所指动作在什么时候发生。很多语言的动词分现在时、过去时和将来时,有些语言分得更细。
definition_en: (gram.) tense; grammatical category indicating the time of the action expressed by the verb; verbs in many languages are divided into the present, past or future tenses, while in others, there are even more tenses

definition_cn: 俗称用药物把感受的风寒发散出来
definition_en: administer medicine to bring out the cold

definition_cn: 代数方程式中未知数的值，例如x+16=0，x=-16，-16就是x+16=0这个方程的解。
definition_en: solution; value of an unknown quantity in an algebra equation, e.g. x＋16=0, therefore x=-16, which is the solution to the equation
same as 落
variant pronunciation for 谁 shéi

definition_cn: 原子价较低的;酸根或化合物中少含一个氢原子或氧原子的
definition_en: of lower atomic valence; acid radical or compound minus one hydrogen or oxygen atom
having the same meaning as 择 zé and used in the following entries
a surname
a surname

definition_cn: [缩砂密](sùshāmì)多年生草本植物,叶子条状披针形,花粉色,蒴果椭圆形。种子棕色,椭圆形,有三个棱,入药叫砂仁。原产越南、缅甸、印度尼西亚等地。
definition_en: cocklebur-like amomun (Amomum xanthioides); herbaceous perennial with striped lanceolate leaves, pink flowers, oval-shaped capsules bearing brown oval seeds with three ridges, called sharen when used in traditional Chinese medicine, found in Vietnam, Myanmar, and Indonesia;

definition_cn: 由金属离子(包括铵离子)和酸根离子组成的化合物。常温时一般为晶体,绝大多数是强电解质,在水溶液中和熔融状态下都能电离。
definition_en: salt; chemical compound made up of metal ions (ammonium ions included) and acid radical ions, generally in a crystalline form under normal temperatures, and mostly being strong electrolytes capable of ionization when dissolved in water
exhaust; use up
tile (a roof)

definition_cn: 旧式书信套语,用在开头的称呼之后,表示请人看信
definition_en: [old-fashioned rhetoric usu. used in the opening phrase of a letter]

definition_cn: 钳子等夹住或齿轮、螺丝等互相卡住
definition_en: (of gears, screws, etc.) bite; catch; (of pincers) grip

definition_cn: 官吏对皇帝上书或说话时的自称。
definition_en: [how a court official referred to himself when addressing the emperor] I; your vassal

definition_cn: 长度单位，一埃等于一亿分之一厘米。主要用来计算光波等的波长。这个单位名称是为纪念瑞典物理学家埃斯特朗而定。
definition_en: angstrom, unit of linear measure. One angstrom equals one tenth of a millimicron or one ten-millionth of a millimetre, primarily used to express electromagnetic wavelengths. This unit of length is named after the Swedish physicist Anders Jonas ╖ngstr╗m (1814-1874).
same as络 luò in meaning

definition_cn: 人或动物体内,由肾脏产生,从尿道排泄出来的液体
definition_en: urine; fluid excreted by the kidney and discharged from the urethra
Abbr. for纬书wěishū
fruit of the orange tree
wail
hunchbacked; bent

definition_cn: [嘧啶](mìdìng)有机化合物,化学式C?H?N?。无色液体或结晶物质,有刺激性气味。用来制化学药品。
definition_en: pyrimidine (C?H?N?), organic chemical compound in the form of a colourless liquid or crystal with an irritant odour, used in making chemicals
relax; relieve; remove
root of a tree
another pronunciation of 惝 chǎng
sound of tearing the skin from the bone
